title: Yavan #3120
definition:
Javan = "Ionia" or "Greece"

 n pr m
 1) a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah

 n pr loc
 2) Greece, Ionia, Ionians
    2a) location of descendants of Javan
nasbUsage:

 n pr m
 1) a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah

 n pr loc

    NASB:  a son of Japheth, also his desc. and their land
